　　When a widowed mother (Erin Oliver) takes her daughters to spend Christmas with her estranged dad on his Texas ranch, she unexpectedly falls in love with a local Mexican restaurant owner (Mateo Verdosa), while learning to forgive her father for the past.单身母亲在圣诞遇到爱情和与父亲和解之旅
